Functions.Name: StackTrace
Functions.Description: Prints a stack trace to the log, so you can see how a blueprint got to this node

Functions.Name: IsValid
Functions.Description: 对象是否可用

Return.Description: true可用，false不可用

Functions.Name: IsValidClass
Functions.Description: 类型是否可用

Return.Description: true可用，false不可用

Return.Description: 对象实际名称

Functions.Description: 获取类展示名称

Functions.Name: StripObjectClass
Functions.Description: If there is an object class, strips it off.

Functions.Name: GetGameName
Functions.Description: Get the name of the current game

Functions.Name: GetGameBundleId
Functions.Description: Retrieves the game's platform-specific bundle identifier or package name of the game

Return.Description: The game's bundle identifier or package name.

Functions.Name: GetPlatformUserName
Functions.Description: Get the current user name from the OS

Functions.Name: GetGameTimeInSeconds
Functions.Description: Get the current game time, in seconds. This stops when the game is paused and is affected by slomo.

Functions.Name: IsServer
Functions.Description: Returns whether the world this object is in is the host or not

Functions.Name: IsDedicatedServer
Functions.Description: Returns whether this is running on a dedicated server

Functions.Name: IsStandalone
Functions.Description: Returns whether this game instance is stand alone (no networking).

Functions.Name: IsPackagedForDistribution
Functions.Description: Returns whether this is a build that is packaged for distribution

Functions.Name: GetUniqueDeviceId
Functions.Description: Returns the platform specific unique device id

Functions.Name: GetDeviceId
Functions.Description: Returns the platform specific unique device id

Functions.Name: Conv_InterfaceToObject
Functions.Description: Converts an interfance into an object

Functions.Description: SoftObjectPath是否有效

Return.Description: true为有效

Functions.Name: Conv_SoftObjectReferenceToString
Functions.Description: Converts a Soft Object Reference to a string. The other direction is not provided because it cannot be validated

Functions.Name: EqualEqual_SoftObjectReference
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are equal (A == B)

Functions.Name: NotEqual_SoftObjectReference
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are not equal (A != B)

Functions.Name: IsValidSoftClassReference
Functions.Description: Returns true if the Soft Class Reference is not null

Functions.Name: Conv_SoftClassReferenceToString
Functions.Description: Converts a Soft Class Reference to a string. The other direction is not provided because it cannot be validated

Functions.Name: EqualEqual_SoftClassReference
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are equal (A == B)

Functions.Name: NotEqual_SoftClassReference
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are not equal (A != B)

Functions.Name: PrintString
Functions.Description:
Prints a string to the log, and optionally, to the screen
	  If Print To Log is true, it will be visible in the Output Log window.  Otherwise it will be logged only as 'Verbose', so it generally won't show up.

Params.Name: bPrintToScreen
Params.Description: Whether or not to print the output to the screen

Params.Name: bPrintToLog
Params.Description: Whether or not to print the output to the log

Params.Name: TextColor
Params.Description: Whether or not to print the output to the console

Params.Name: Duration
Params.Description: The display duration (if Print to Screen is True). Using negative number will result in loading the duration time from the config.

Functions.Name: PrintText
Functions.Description:
Prints text to the log, and optionally, to the screen
	  If Print To Log is true, it will be visible in the Output Log window.  Otherwise it will be logged only as 'Verbose', so it generally won't show up.

Params.Name: bPrintToScreen
Params.Description: Whether or not to print the output to the screen

Params.Name: bPrintToLog
Params.Description: Whether or not to print the output to the log

Params.Name: TextColor
Params.Description: Whether or not to print the output to the console

Params.Name: Duration
Params.Description: The display duration (if Print to Screen is True). Using negative number will result in loading the duration time from the config.

Functions.Name: PrintWarning
Functions.Description:
Prints a warning string to the log and the screen. Meant to be used as a way to inform the user that they misused the node.
	 
	  WARNING!! Don't change the signature of this function without fixing up all nodes using it in the compiler

Functions.Name: SetWindowTitle
Functions.Description: Sets the game window title

Functions.Name: ExecuteConsoleCommand
Functions.Description: Executes a console command, optionally on a specific controller

Params.Name: Command
Params.Description: Command to send to the console

Params.Name: SpecificPlayer
Params.Description: If specified, the console command will be routed through the specified player

Functions.Name: GetConsoleVariableFloatValue
Functions.Description: Attempts to retrieve the value of the specified float console variable, if it exists.

Params.Name: VariableName
Params.Description: Name of the console variable to find.

Return.Description: The value if found, 0 otherwise.

Functions.Name: GetConsoleVariableIntValue
Functions.Description: Attempts to retrieve the value of the specified integer console variable, if it exists.

Params.Name: VariableName
Params.Description: Name of the console variable to find.

Return.Description: The value if found, 0 otherwise.

Functions.Name: GetConsoleVariableBoolValue
Functions.Description: Evaluates, if it exists, whether the specified integer console variable has a non-zero value (true) or not (false).

Params.Name: VariableName
Params.Description: Name of the console variable to find.

Return.Description: True if found and has a non-zero value, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: QuitGame
Functions.Description: Exit the current game

Params.Name: SpecificPlayer
Params.Description: The specific player to quit the game. If not specified, player 0 will quit.

Functions.Name: Delay
Functions.Description: Perform a latent action with a delay (specified in seconds).  Calling again while it is counting down will be ignored.

Functions.Name: DelayUntilNextTick
Functions.Description: Perform a latent action with a delay of one tick.  Calling again while it is counting down will be ignored.

Functions.Name: DelayReplacePreDuration
Functions.Description: Perform a latent action with a delay (specified in seconds).  Calling again while it is counting down will be ignored.

Functions.Name: RetriggerableDelay
Functions.Description: Perform a latent action with a retriggerable delay (specified in seconds).  Calling again while it is counting down will reset the countdown to Duration.

Functions.Name: MoveComponentTo
Functions.Description: Interpolate a component to the specified relative location and rotation over the course of OverTime seconds.

Params.Name: bEaseOut
Params.Description: if true we will ease out (ie end slowly) during interpolation

Params.Name: bEaseIn
Params.Description: if true we will ease in (ie start slowly) during interpolation

Params.Name: bForceShortestRotationPath
Params.Description: if true we will always use the shortest path for rotation

Functions.Name: K2_SetTimerDelegate
Functions.Description: Set a timer to execute delegate. Setting an existing timer will reset that timer with updated parameters.

Params.Name: Time
Params.Description: How long to wait before executing the delegate, in seconds. Setting a timer to <= 0 seconds will clear it if it is set.

Params.Name: bLooping
Params.Description: True to keep executing the delegate every Time seconds, false to execute delegate only once.

Return.Description: The timer handle to pass to other timer functions to manipulate this timer.

Functions.Name: K2_SetTimerForNextTickDelegate
Functions.Description: Set a timer to execute a delegate next tick.

Return.Description: The timer handle to pass to other timer functions to manipulate this timer.

Functions.Name: K2_SetTimerTickDelegate
Functions.Description: Set a timer to execute delegate. Setting an existing timer will reset that timer with updated parameters.

Params.Name: Time
Params.Description: How long to wait before executing the delegate, in seconds. Setting a timer to <= 0 seconds will clear it if it is set.

Return.Description: The timer handle to pass to other timer functions to manipulate this timer.

Functions.Name: K2_SetTimerDelegateForLua
Functions.Description: Set a timer to execute delegate. Setting an existing timer will reset that timer with updated parameters.

Params.Name: Object
Params.Description: Object that implements the delegate function. Defaults to self (this blueprint)

Params.Name: Time
Params.Description: How long to wait before executing the delegate, in seconds. Setting a timer to <= 0 seconds will clear it if it is set.

Params.Name: bLooping
Params.Description: True to keep executing the delegate every Time seconds, false to execute delegate only once.

Return.Description: The timer handle to pass to other timer functions to manipulate this timer.

Functions.Name: K2_ClearTimerDelegate
Functions.Description: Clears a set timer.

Functions.Name: K2_PauseTimerDelegate
Functions.Description: Pauses a set timer at its current elapsed time.

Functions.Name: K2_UnPauseTimerDelegate
Functions.Description: Resumes a paused timer from its current elapsed time.

Functions.Name: K2_IsTimerActiveDelegate
Functions.Description: Returns true if a timer exists and is active for the given delegate, false otherwise.

Return.Description: True if the timer exists and is active.

Functions.Name: K2_IsTimerPausedDelegate
Functions.Description: Returns true if a timer exists and is paused for the given delegate, false otherwise.

Return.Description: True if the timer exists and is paused.

Functions.Name: K2_TimerExistsDelegate
Functions.Description: Returns true is a timer for the given delegate exists, false otherwise.

Return.Description: True if the timer exists.

Functions.Name: K2_GetTimerElapsedTimeDelegate
Functions.Description: Returns elapsed time for the given delegate (time since current countdown iteration began).

Return.Description: How long has elapsed since the current iteration of the timer began.

Functions.Name: K2_GetTimerRemainingTimeDelegate
Functions.Description: Returns time until the timer will next execute its delegate.

Return.Description: How long is remaining in the current iteration of the timer.

Functions.Name: K2_IsValidTimerHandle
Functions.Description: Returns whether the timer handle is valid. This does not indicate that there is an active timer that this handle references, but rather that it once referenced a valid timer.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to check validity of.

Return.Description: Whether the timer handle is valid.

Functions.Name: K2_InvalidateTimerHandle
Functions.Description: Returns whether the timer handle is valid. This does not indicate that there is an active timer that this handle references, but rather that it once referenced a valid timer.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to check validity of.

Return.Description: Return the invalidated timer handle for convenience.

Functions.Name: K2_ClearTimerHandle
Functions.Description: Clears a set timer.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to clear.

Functions.Name: K2_ClearAndInvalidateTimerHandle
Functions.Description: Clears a set timer.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to clear.

Functions.Name: K2_PauseTimerHandle
Functions.Description: Pauses a set timer at its current elapsed time.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to pause.

Functions.Name: K2_UnPauseTimerHandle
Functions.Description: Resumes a paused timer from its current elapsed time.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to unpause.

Functions.Name: K2_IsTimerActiveHandle
Functions.Description: Returns true if a timer exists and is active for the given handle, false otherwise.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to check whether it is active.

Return.Description: True if the timer exists and is active.

Functions.Name: K2_IsTimerPausedHandle
Functions.Description: Returns true if a timer exists and is paused for the given handle, false otherwise.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to check whether it is paused.

Return.Description: True if the timer exists and is paused.

Functions.Name: K2_TimerExistsHandle
Functions.Description: Returns true is a timer for the given handle exists, false otherwise.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle to check whether it exists.

Return.Description: True if the timer exists.

Functions.Name: K2_GetTimerElapsedTimeHandle
Functions.Description: Returns elapsed time for the given handle (time since current countdown iteration began).

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to get the elapsed time of.

Return.Description: How long has elapsed since the current iteration of the timer began.

Functions.Name: K2_GetTimerRemainingTimeHandle
Functions.Description: Returns time until the timer will next execute its handle.

Params.Name: Handle
Params.Description: The handle of the timer to time remaining of.

Return.Description: How long is remaining in the current iteration of the timer.

Functions.Name: K2_SetTimer
Functions.Description: Set a timer to execute delegate. Setting an existing timer will reset that timer with updated parameters.

Params.Name: Object
Params.Description: Object that implements the delegate function. Defaults to self (this blueprint)

Params.Name: FunctionName
Params.Description: Delegate function name. Can be a K2 function or a Custom Event.

Params.Name: Time
Params.Description: How long to wait before executing the delegate, in seconds. Setting a timer to <= 0 seconds will clear it if it is set.

Params.Name: bLooping
Params.Description: true to keep executing the delegate every Time seconds, false to execute delegate only once.

Return.Description: The timer handle to pass to other timer functions to manipulate this timer.

Functions.Name: K2_SetTimerForNextTick
Functions.Description: Set a timer to execute a delegate on the next tick.

Params.Name: Object
Params.Description: Object that implements the delegate function. Defaults to self (this blueprint)

Params.Name: FunctionName
Params.Description: Delegate function name. Can be a K2 function or a Custom Event.

Return.Description: The timer handle to pass to other timer functions to manipulate this timer.

Functions.Name: SphereOverlapActors
Functions.Description: 返回一组跟指定球体范围发生重叠的Actor

Params.Name: ObjectTypes
Params.Description: 将结果限制为仅静态或仅动态的选项

Params.Name: ActorClassFilter
Params.Description: 对象类型过滤，只检测指定类型的Actor

Params.Name: OutActors
Params.Description: 输出的产生碰撞的Actor列表

Return.Description: true if there was an overlap that passed the filters, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SphereOverlapComponents
Functions.Description: 返回一组跟指定球体范围发生重叠的Component

Params.Description: 将结果限制为仅静态或仅动态的选项

Params.Name: ComponentClassFilter
Params.Description: 组件类型过滤，只检测指定类型的组件

Params.Name: OutComponents
Params.Description: 输出的产生碰撞的组件列表

Return.Description: true if there was an overlap that passed the filters, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: GetActorListFromComponentList
Functions.Description: Returns an array of unique actors represented by the given list of components.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugLine
Functions.Description: Draw a debug line

Functions.Name: DrawDebugCircle
Functions.Description: Draw a debug circle!

Functions.Name: DrawDebugPoint
Functions.Description: Draw a debug point

Functions.Name: DrawDebugArrow
Functions.Description: Draw directional arrow, pointing from LineStart to LineEnd.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugBox
Functions.Description: Draw a debug box

Functions.Name: DrawDebugCoordinateSystem
Functions.Description: Draw a debug coordinate system.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugSphere
Functions.Description: Draw a debug sphere

Functions.Name: DrawDebugCylinder
Functions.Description: Draw a debug cylinder

Functions.Name: DrawDebugCone
Functions.Description: Draw a debug cone

Functions.Name: DrawDebugConeInDegrees
Functions.Description:
Draw a debug cone
	  Angles are specified in degrees

Functions.Name: DrawDebugCapsule
Functions.Description: Draw a debug capsule

Functions.Name: DrawDebugString
Functions.Description: Draw a debug string at a 3d world location.

Functions.Name: FlushDebugStrings
Functions.Description: Removes all debug strings.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugPlane
Functions.Description: Draws a debug plane.

Functions.Name: FlushPersistentDebugLines
Functions.Description: Flush all persistent debug lines and shapes.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugFrustum
Functions.Description: Draws a debug frustum.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugCamera
Functions.Description: Draw a debug camera shape.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugFloatHistoryTransform
Functions.Description: Draws a 2D Histogram of size 'DrawSize' based FDebugFloatHistory struct, using DrawTransform for the position in the world.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugFloatHistoryLocation
Functions.Description: Draws a 2D Histogram of size 'DrawSize' based FDebugFloatHistory struct, using DrawLocation for the location in the world, rotation will face camera of first player.

Functions.Name: DrawDebugActorMoveTrack
Functions.Description: 绘制Actor运动轨迹

Functions.Name: DrawDebugActorName
Functions.Description: 绘制Actor名称

Functions.Name: DrawDebugDistance
Functions.Description: 绘制Self到Tartget的连线与距离

Functions.Name: DrawDebugTargetAimedAt
Functions.Description: 绘制准心瞄准物体名称

Functions.Name: DrawDebugActorCollision
Functions.Description: 绘制碰撞盒

Functions.Name: DrawDebugActorBounds
Functions.Description: 绘制Actor的包围盒

Functions.Name: CreateCopyForUndoBuffer
Functions.Description: Mark as modified.

Functions.Name: GetComponentBounds
Functions.Description: Get bounds

Functions.Name: GetRenderingDetailMode
Functions.Description:
Get the clamped state of r.DetailMode, see console variable help (allows for scalability, cannot be used in construction scripts)
	  0: low, show only object with DetailMode low or higher
	  1: medium, show all object with DetailMode medium or higher
	  2: high, show all objects

Functions.Name: GetRenderingMaterialQualityLevel
Functions.Description:
Get the clamped state of r.MaterialQualityLevel, see console variable help (allows for scalability, cannot be used in construction scripts)
	  0: low
	  1: high
	  2: medium
	  3: ultimatehigh

Functions.Name: GetSupportedFullscreenResolutions
Functions.Description: Gets the list of support fullscreen resolutions.

Return.Description: true if successfully queried the device for available resolutions.

Functions.Name: GetConvenientWindowedResolutions
Functions.Description: Gets the list of windowed resolutions which are convenient for the current primary display size.

Return.Description: true if successfully queried the device for available resolutions.

Functions.Name: GetMinYResolutionForUI
Functions.Description: Gets the smallest Y resolution we want to support in the UI, clamped within reasons

Return.Description: value in pixels

Functions.Name: GetMinYResolutionFor3DView
Functions.Description: Gets the smallest Y resolution we want to support in the 3D view, clamped within reasons

Return.Description: value in pixels

Functions.Name: ShowAdBanner
Functions.Description:
Will show an ad banner (iAd on iOS, or AdMob on Android) on the top or bottom of screen, on top of the GL view (doesn't resize the view)
	  (iOS and Android only)

Params.Name: AdIdIndex
Params.Description: The index of the ID to select for the ad to show

Params.Name: bShowOnBottomOfScreen
Params.Description: If true, the iAd will be shown at the bottom of the screen, top otherwise

Functions.Name: GetAdIDCount
Functions.Description: Retrieves the total number of Ad IDs that can be selected between

Functions.Name: HideAdBanner
Functions.Description:
Hides the ad banner (iAd on iOS, or AdMob on Android). Will force close the ad if it's open
	  (iOS and Android only)

Functions.Name: ForceCloseAdBanner
Functions.Description:
Forces closed any displayed ad. Can lead to loss of revenue
	  (iOS and Android only)

Functions.Name: LoadInterstitialAd
Functions.Description:
Will load a fullscreen interstitial AdMob ad. Call this before using ShowInterstitialAd
	 (Android only)

Params.Name: AdIdIndex
Params.Description: The index of the ID to select for the ad to show

Functions.Name: IsInterstitialAdAvailable
Functions.Description:
Returns true if the requested interstitial ad is loaded and ready
	 (Android only)

Functions.Name: IsInterstitialAdRequested
Functions.Description:
Returns true if the requested interstitial ad has been successfully requested (false if load request fails)
	 (Android only)

Functions.Name: ShowInterstitialAd
Functions.Description:
Shows the loaded interstitial ad (loaded with LoadInterstitialAd)
	 (Android only)

Functions.Name: ShowPlatformSpecificLeaderboardScreen
Functions.Description: Displays the built-in leaderboard GUI (iOS and Android only; this function may be renamed or moved in a future release)

Functions.Name: ShowPlatformSpecificAchievementsScreen
Functions.Description: Displays the built-in achievements GUI (iOS and Android only; this function may be renamed or moved in a future release)

Params.Name: SpecificPlayer
Params.Description: Specific player's achievements to show. May not be supported on all platforms. If null, defaults to the player with ControllerId 0

Functions.Name: IsLoggedIn
Functions.Description: Returns whether the player is logged in to the currently active online subsystem.

Functions.Name: ControlScreensaver
Functions.Description: Allows or inhibits screensaver

Params.Name: bAllowScreenSaver
Params.Description: If false, don't allow screensaver if possible, otherwise allow default behavior

Functions.Name: SetVolumeButtonsHandledBySystem
Functions.Description: Allows or inhibits system default handling of volume up and volume down buttons (Android only)

Params.Name: bEnabled
Params.Description: If true, allow Android to handle volume up and down events

Functions.Name: GetVolumeButtonsHandledBySystem
Functions.Description: Returns true if system default handling of volume up and volume down buttons enabled (Android only)

Functions.Name: ResetGamepadAssignments
Functions.Description: Resets the gamepad to player controller id assignments (Android only)

Functions.Name: ResetGamepadAssignmentToController
Functions.Description: Resets the gamepad assignment to player controller id (Android only)

Functions.Name: IsControllerAssignedToGamepad
Functions.Description: Returns true if controller id assigned to a gamepad (Android only)

Functions.Name: SetSuppressViewportTransitionMessage
Functions.Description: Sets the state of the transition message rendered by the viewport. (The blue text displayed when the game is paused and so forth.)

Functions.Name: GetPreferredLanguages
Functions.Description: Returns an array of the user's preferred languages in order of preference

Return.Description: An array of language IDs ordered from most preferred to least

Functions.Name: GetDefaultLanguage
Functions.Description: Get the default language (for localization) used by this platform

Return.Description: The language as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN")

Functions.Name: GetDefaultLocale
Functions.Description: Get the default locale (for internationalization) used by this platform

Return.Description: The locale as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN")

Functions.Name: GetLocalCurrencyCode
Functions.Description: Returns the currency code associated with the device's locale

Return.Description: the currency code associated with the device's locale

Functions.Name: GetLocalCurrencySymbol
Functions.Description: Returns the currency symbol associated with the device's locale

Return.Description: the currency symbol associated with the device's locale

Functions.Name: RegisterForRemoteNotifications
Functions.Description:
Requests permission to send remote notifications to the user's device.
	  (Android and iOS only)

Functions.Name: UnregisterForRemoteNotifications
Functions.Description:
Requests Requests unregistering from receiving remote notifications to the user's device.
	 (Android only)

Functions.Name: SetUserActivity
Functions.Description: Tells the engine what the user is doing for debug, analytics, etc.

Functions.Name: GetCommandLine
Functions.Description: Returns the command line that the process was launched with.

Functions.Name: GetObjectFromPrimaryAssetId
Functions.Description: Returns the Object associated with a Primary Asset Id, this will only return a valid object if it is in memory, it will not load it

Functions.Name: GetClassFromPrimaryAssetId
Functions.Description: Returns the Blueprint Class associated with a Primary Asset Id, this will only return a valid object if it is in memory, it will not load it

Functions.Name: GetSoftObjectReferenceFromPrimaryAssetId
Functions.Description: Returns the Object Id associated with a Primary Asset Id, this works even if the asset is not loaded

Functions.Name: GetSoftClassReferenceFromPrimaryAssetId
Functions.Description: Returns the Blueprint Class Id associated with a Primary Asset Id, this works even if the asset is not loaded

Functions.Name: GetPrimaryAssetIdFromObject
Functions.Description: Returns the Primary Asset Id for an Object, this can return an invalid one if not registered

Functions.Name: GetPrimaryAssetIdFromClass
Functions.Description: Returns the Primary Asset Id for a Class, this can return an invalid one if not registered

Functions.Name: GetPrimaryAssetIdFromSoftObjectReference
Functions.Description: Returns the Primary Asset Id for a Soft Object Reference, this can return an invalid one if not registered

Functions.Name: GetPrimaryAssetIdFromSoftClassReference
Functions.Description: Returns the Primary Asset Id for a Soft Class Reference, this can return an invalid one if not registered

Functions.Name: GetPrimaryAssetIdList
Functions.Description: Returns list of PrimaryAssetIds for a PrimaryAssetType

Functions.Name: IsValidPrimaryAssetId
Functions.Description: Returns true if the Primary Asset Id is valid

Functions.Name: Conv_PrimaryAssetIdToString
Functions.Description: Converts a Primary Asset Id to a string. The other direction is not provided because it cannot be validated

Functions.Name: EqualEqual_PrimaryAssetId
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are equal (A == B)

Functions.Name: NotEqual_PrimaryAssetId
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are not equal (A != B)

Functions.Name: IsValidPrimaryAssetType
Functions.Description: Returns list of Primary Asset Ids for a PrimaryAssetType

Functions.Name: Conv_PrimaryAssetTypeToString
Functions.Description: Converts a Primary Asset Type to a string. The other direction is not provided because it cannot be validated

Functions.Name: EqualEqual_PrimaryAssetType
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are equal (A == B)

Functions.Name: NotEqual_PrimaryAssetType
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are not equal (A != B)

Functions.Name: UnloadPrimaryAsset
Functions.Description: Unloads a primary asset, which allows it to be garbage collected if nothing else is referencing it

Functions.Name: UnloadPrimaryAssetList
Functions.Description: Unloads a primary asset, which allows it to be garbage collected if nothing else is referencing it

Functions.Name: GetCurrentBundleState
Functions.Description:
Returns the list of loaded bundles for a given Primary Asset. This will return false if the asset is not loaded at all.
	  If ForceCurrentState is true it will return the current state even if a load is in process

Functions.Name: GetPrimaryAssetsWithBundleState
Functions.Description:
Returns the list of assets that are in a given bundle state. Required Bundles must be specified
	  If ExcludedBundles is not empty, it will not return any assets in those bundle states
	  If ValidTypes is not empty, it will only return assets of those types
	  If ForceCurrentState is true it will use the current state even if a load is in process

Functions.Name: AddResMapping
Functions.Description: Functions for Asset Redirect
